## 🗄️ Proposed schema change

<!-- Describe the database schema change you are proposing.
  Include table names, columns, data types, and indexes as applicable.
-->

## 🎯 Why is it needed?

<!-- Explain the motivation:
  - What feature or fix requires this schema change?
  - What problem does it solve?
-->

## ⚠️ Breaking changes

<!-- List any backward-incompatible changes:
  - Columns being removed or renamed
  - Type changes that may break existing data
  - Required data backfill steps
  - Impact on existing queries or API responses
-->

## 🔍 Alternatives considered

<!-- Describe other approaches you considered and why you discarded them. -->
